scene_1.visual_plan: Start with a medium shot of the model sitting inside a car, natural daylight coming through the window, using a tripod for a steady, intimate framing. The camera slowly zooms in as the model begins speaking, maintaining a shallow depth of field with a soft blurred background to keep focus on the model's face. Midway, cut to a close-up shot of the model holding the Ottocast Play2Video Ultra in their right hand, fingers gently tapping the device as they talk, with natural handheld camera motion to add realism. Return to the medium shot with the product held near the model’s face, softly lit to highlight the device, as they finish speaking with a relaxed smile.
scene_1.dialogue: 『私が車のエンタメ環境をアップグレードする前に知っておけばよかったことは、実は有線のCarPlayをOttocast Play2Video Ultraで簡単にマルチメディアセンターに変えられるってことです。以前は機能が限られていて苦労していました。』
